name: Basic Hamburgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together, including any variations you choose.
2. Shape the mixture into 6 patties, each about 3/4-inch thick.
3. Broil or grill the patties, 4-inches from the heat. Turn once and cook to your desired doneness (10 to 15 minutes).
4. Serve on toasted buns with favorite toppings.
